actions.value:
Edge has enabled segwit support for Litecoin which means the wallet generates M-address types. Not all services are compatible with this yet and they may need to convert your M-address to a 3-address. You can do that in the wallet by tapping on the three dot menu on the Receive screen (the screen that shows your QR code) and tap "Use Legacy Address"


For more information about litecoin segwit addresses, please read this blog post from Trezor: https://blog.trezor.io/litecoins-new-p2sh-segwit-addresses-843633e3e707
